instruction.title: SEO, Accessibility & Performance Specification
instruction.overview: This document defines index configurations, semantic guidelines, JSON-LD structures, accessibility focus management models, and Core Web Vitals optimizations.

seo.robots_txt: User-agent: * Allow: / Disallow: /api/ Disallow: /_next/ Sitemap: https://antigravity-data.com/sitemap.xml

headings.rule: Exactly one h1 heading exists inside the Hero Section.
Section titles utilize h2. Card modules utilize h3. Subheadings follow strict descending hierarchy.

json_ld.script_head:
{ "@context": "https://schema.org", "@type": "SoftwareApplication", "name": "Antigravity Data Automation", "description": "Premium automated data pipeline engine. Connect databases, configure schemas, and deploy serverless pipelines without writing glue code.", "applicationCategory": "BusinessApplication", "operatingSystem": "Web", "offers": { "@type": "AggregateOffer", "priceCurrency": "USD", "lowPrice": "0", "highPrice": "99", "offerCount": "3" } } ] </script_head> </json_ld> </seo>
<accessibility> <skip_to_content> <anchor href="#main-content" class="skipLink" text="Skip to content" /> <styling>Position off-screen (top: -100px) until focused via Tab (top: 16px). Styled with Forsythia fill.</styling> </skip_to_content>
<focus_management> <ring>*:focus-visible matches 2px outline-color Forsythia, offset 2px.</ring> <isolation>Outline indicator renders only on keyboard tabs, not mouse clicks.</isolation> <trapping>Mobile menu drawer intercepts Tab focus. Captures keyboard focus inside modal and returns focus to menu button on close.</trapping> </focus_management>
<aria_matrix> <element name="MobileMenuToggle" attribute="aria-expanded" values="true | false" /> <element name="MobileMenuToggle" attribute="aria-controls" value="mobile-navigation" /> <element name="MobileMenuDrawer" role="dialog" attribute="aria-modal" value="true" /> <element name="CurrencySelectorButton" attribute="aria-haspopup" value="listbox" /> <element name="CurrencySelectorList" role="listbox" /> <element name="PricingCardPrice" attribute="aria-live" value="polite" /> <element name="FAQAccordionHeader" attribute="aria-expanded" values="true | false" /> <element name="FAQAccordionPanel" role="region" /> </aria_matrix> </accessibility>
<performance> <assets> <images>Inline SVG icons directly. Raster images compress to WebP/AVIF, use explicit heights/widths to prevent CLS layout shifts, and lazy load below the fold.</images> <fonts>Load local woff2 files. Add font-display: swap to prevent FOIT text delays.</fonts> </assets> <hydration> <rule>Keep static structural grids as 100% Server Components (RSC) to ship 0 bytes of JS for layouts.</rule> <rule>Wrap interactive dynamic controls inside small Client Component (RCC) leaf nodes.</rule> </hydration> <budgets FCP="0.8s" LCP="1.5s" CLS="0.01" INP="80ms" hydration="150ms" /> </performance> </instruction>
